heading: Transfers of funds by Secretary of Senate; approval of Committee on Appropriations
label: 6562 Transfers of funds by Secretary of Senate; approval of Committee on Appropriations
text: During any fiscal year (commencing with the fiscal year beginning ) the Secretary of the Senate is authorized to make such transfers between appropriations of funds available for disbursement by him during such year, subject to the approval of the Committee on Appropriations of the Senate.October 1, 1982
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 64–2 of this titleSection is based on section 104 of S. 2939, Ninety-seventh Congress, 2d Session, as reported , and incorporated by reference in , to be effective as if enacted into law.Sept. 22, 1982section 101(e) of Pub. L. 97–276

Transfer of Funds by Secretary of SenateProvisions authorizing Secretary of Senate, as Disbursing Officer of Senate, to make such transfers between appropriations of funds available for disbursement by him for specific fiscal years, as he deems appropriate, subject to customary reprograming procedures of Senate Committee on Appropriations were contained in the following appropriation acts:, , .Pub.
